text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Those were delicious. Phew... I ate quite a lot.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wurst. My parents sent me a mixer along with the
recipe, so I made them from scratch.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's German sausage, right? And you
made it yourself? That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You don't usually eat this late at night, though.
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The recipe yielded quite a lot of servings, so I
have been eating them outside of normal meal
times so they don't go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense! It's so like you to follow
directions and recipes to a T! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me, or are you looking a little heftier
than usual?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You're correct. My weight has increased
incrementally from eating wurst every day.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And you're not worried about that?! You'll fall out
of your weight range if you're not careful!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is no issue. This weight gain is well within
expected parameters.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
According to my plan, as long as I adjust my
overall food intake correctly, my weight should
return to normal in no time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, you even keep track of what your
weight should be in your schedule? That's
hard-core!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Since my parents went through the trouble of
sending me the mixer, I wanted to make good use
of it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And in order to make the most flavorful wursts
and enjoy every bite, I adjusted my schedule
accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she planned, it doesn't take long for Eishin
Flash's weight to return to normal.
